updates.prompt: Ok I'm going to have Claude code update ur neural nexus code and also continue upgrading the game and everything we been work and building in, graphics and characters models and c++ engine and unity euphoria unreal levels of gameplay physics mechanics character models and gameplay polish and visual and physics polish and full working good and realistic looking strikes and grapple and dives and combat and zoning and full WWE 2k and Steve masson neckbreaker visceral pro wrestling and mdickie levels in all ways and mark that down as something very important and in memory and the GitHub repo so it's the first thing Claude code looks at when it opens the file like a big hey look at me first this is where we left off this is what we need done type of file
updates.action_taken: Created a highly visible hand-off file named 'HEY_CLAUDE_READ_ME_FIRST.md' at the root of the repository. Documented the immediate mission for Claude to upgrade the C++ Neural Nexus code to Euphoria/Unreal physics levels, implementing AAA-quality character models, environmental destruction, and hyper-realistic WWE 2K/VPW/MDickie-style combat, strikes, and grapples. Outlined exactly where the project left off (Act 5 Vacancy Boss, NG+ Queen Ascendant) so Claude can pick up seamlessly.
